title: Phase 19: PSM 0x0010 leading-word audit (sub-kind discriminator, partial)
objective: Add a stable audit-only leading_word: Option<u16> field to the Phase 18 0x0010 sub-record DTO (= payload[0..2] little-endian u16). Confirmed by Phase 19 probe: 28% of 578 records have leading_word == 0x0002. Audit-only — no sub-kind field naming, no PidGraphicKind variant.
evidence: Initial scaffold created after RAD sibling-sweep hypothesis was falsified (see docs/analysis/2026-05-17-phase19-rad-sibling-probe-null-result.md). User confirmed leading-word angle (recommended option A) via MCP relay channel.

summary: Original Phase 19 RAD sibling hypothesis (47FCC330..47FCC33E CLSID range -> PSM 0x29..0x35) FALSIFIED. Only existing JStyleOverride (0x0030) has hits. Pivot to leading-word audit angle. Full table written to docs/analysis/2026-05-17-phase19-rad-sibling-probe-null-result.md.

Phase 19 probe confirms leading_word @ payload[0..2] is a partial sub-kind discriminator: 28% of records have 0x0002, plus single-word-dominant size buckets covering ~280 additional records. But size 31 (182 records, largest bucket), 70, 13, 16, 43 are heterogeneous at +0 — they likely encode coords / OIDs not discriminators. Phase 19 scope is therefore strictly 'expose leading_word as audit-only u16, do not name sub_kind, do not pursue per-size discriminator offsets'.

Phase 19 goal package drafted. Strategy: extend Phase 18 audit DTO with single Option<u16> field named leading_word (byte-position name, no semantic). Slices A-G = inventory / parser DTO + unit tests / model DTO + schema / cross-fixture ratchet (0x0002=164, 0x0003=21, 0x0001=18, None=0) / Phase 18 regression check / CHANGELOG / 5 gates. Estimated workload ~30% of Phase 18. Pending user gate before /goal execution; will be triggered by next message from user.

Phase 18 mirror points located: parser DTO src/parsers/sheet_records.rs L3581-3597 (SheetSubRecord0x0010Decoded), decoder src/parsers/sheet_records.rs L3634-3668 (decode_sub_record_0x0010_at), parser unit tests L5056-5188 (12 tests), model DTO src/model.rs L1375-1392 (DecodedSubRecord0x0010Record), model From impl L1394-1407, schema needles src/schema.rs L162-163 (needs leading_word added). cluster.rs / cfb/reader.rs / geometry.rs unaffected (leading_word is a value field). Existing Phase 18 ratchet test sub_records_0x0010_decoder_emits_audit_records_with_provenance in tests/parse_real_files.rs is co-located.

SheetSubRecord0x0010Decoded.leading_word: Option<u16> field added. Decoder fills via raw_payload.get(0..2).map(|s| u16::from_le_bytes([s[0], s[1]])). 14 unit tests all green (12 Phase 18 + 2 new): sub_record_0x0010_leading_word_matches_first_two_payload_bytes_le (verifies LE u16 extraction with 0x0002 / 0x0003 / 0x4E1C inputs), sub_record_0x0010_leading_word_is_none_for_sub_two_byte_payload (verifies Option contract for manually-constructed DTO with raw_payload.len() < 2). Phase 18 canonical test extended to also assert leading_word == Some(0x0100).

DecodedSubRecord0x0010Record.leading_word: Option<u16> mirror added with #[serde(default)] for backward-compatible deserialization. From<SheetSubRecord0x0010Decoded> impl propagates the field. JsonSchema derive auto-covers. src/schema.rs default-schema needle ratchet adds 'leading_word'. 8 schema tests all green.

reconciliation: decoder-side leading_word counts exactly match probe (0x0002=164 / 0x0003=21 / 0x0001=18). The 4-record probe-vs-decoder discrepancy (probe=578, decoder=582) stems from the probe's standalone iter_records loop boundary, not the decoder's leading_word extraction. Ratchet asserts: total=582 (matches Phase 18), None=0 (decoder min payload=8 ≥ 2), top-3 ranking = [0x0002, 0x0003, 0x0001], 0x0002 coverage ≥ 25%.

results.phase18_ratchet: 582 records (DWG-0201=161, DWG-0202=104, 工艺管道-1=306, A01=11) - unchanged

summary: Phase 18 ratchet still 582 (unchanged). Normalized geometry baseline still 394 entities (Phase 18 final state). leading_word field addition is strictly additive.

CHANGELOG.md Phase 19 entry written (~90 lines): RAD sibling null-result context, leading_word probe evidence (164/21/18), audit-only design choices, 4 'no's (no sub-kind naming, no PidGraphicKind, no per-size offsets, no reference resolver), Future Work pointer to Phase 20+. AGENTS.md 0x0010 paragraph extended with one Phase 19 line summarizing leading_word distribution and the heterogeneous-bucket caveat.

results.test: ok 851 lib unit (Phase 18=849 + 2 leading_word) + 90 parse_real_files integration (Phase 18=89 + 1 leading_word ratchet) + others, 0 failed
results.clippy: ok (after extracting BTreeMap type aliases ByteHist/WordHist/SizeBucket in probe_psm_0x0010_sub_kind.rs to satisfy clippy::type_complexity)
results.fmt: ok after cargo fmt --all auto-apply (cleaned up pre-existing rustfmt drift in probe_rad_siblings_0x0029_0x0035.rs from the prior session)

summary: Phase 14 (GLine2d=3, igLine2d=284, igLineString2d=119, igPoint2d=146, igTextBox=142, igSymbol2d=27) + Phase 15 (GraphicGroup=352) + Phase 16 (JStyleOverride=98) + Phase 17 (PrimitiveArc surface removed) + Phase 18 (decoded_sub_records_0x0010=582, normalized_geometry entities=394) baselines all preserved as part of the full workspace test gate. Targeted Phase 14 igLine2d test spot-checked separately and green.
